meta.note: Faithful, extractive summaries; every item links to its original source.

items.headline: Prentis, new AI lab co-founded by Reid Hoffman, Marc Pincus in talks to raise $100M
items.summary: The neolab is betting that automating routine computer tasks will soon outpace coding as AI's biggest use case.

items.headline: Canadian legislator reads out apparent LLM response in floor speech
items.summary: "Here’s a more natural, flowing version of that section..."

items.headline: Anthropic's Opus 5 is about token efficiency, not a capability leap
items.summary: Models are improving quickly, but the cheaper options are often good enough.

items.headline: Political text messages could get more effective and annoying. Blame AI

items.headline: Opus 5 is currently #1 on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Leaderboard

items.headline: Midjourney bought the astrology app Co-Star
items.summary: Midjourney, which has gone from generating AI cat images to full-body ultrasound scans, is getting into a new field: astrology. The AI startup announced on Thursday that it has acquired the personalized astrology app Co-Star, as reported…

items.headline: Why Cognition bought Poke: AI personality is becoming a competitive advantage
items.summary: The acquisition brings Poke’s conversational style and interaction model to Cognition’s coding agent Devin, reflecting a growing belief that how AI assistants interact with users is as important as the models powering them.

items.headline: Team uses AlphaFold AI to redesign gene-editing proteins to make them safer
items.summary: Google's AlphaFold can help ID what parts of a gene editing protein enable mistakes.

items.headline: You can’t ignore Google Zero anymore
items.summary: The web and Google once had a deal: Google collects data and indexes webpages and in exchange sends oceans of traffic to websites. The deal wasn't perfect and certainly made Google more money than it made the websites, but it worked for a…

items.headline: Anthropic releases Opus 5 with ‘close’ to Fable 5’s capabilities
items.summary: Weeks after Anthropic's latest toe-to-toe with the US government, and days after an OpenAI security incident that dominated tech industry discussions, Anthropic on Thursday released its newest model, Claude Opus 5. The company said in a…

items.headline: Meta is making its AI chatbot more like an assistant
items.summary: Meta is upgrading its AI chatbot with new productivity features in a bid to compete with rivals like Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude. The update will allow Meta AI to tap into your calendar to help you plan events and generate daily briefings,…

items.headline: Anthropic launches Opus 5
items.summary: Opus 5 will be both cheaper and less restrictive than Fable, likely making it preferable in most use cases.

items.headline: As US weighs response to Chinese AI, industry urges against broad open-weight restrictions
items.summary: AI companies, including Nvidia and Mistral, urge policymakers to avoid broad restrictions on open-weight AI models as Washington debates responses to Chinese AI and alleged model distillation.

items.headline: Bluesky’s AI assistant Attie expands into an open social research tool
items.summary: Users can now ask Attie questions about news, trends, and conversations on Bluesky and other apps on the AT Protocol.

items.headline: Midjourney acquired the astrology app Co-Star
items.summary: The AI lab Midjourney continues to expand its purview beyond image and video generation.

items.headline: The tech-broification of American science has officially begun
items.summary: The Trump administration unveiled the first "Genesis Mission" grants on Thursday, directing $5 billion toward hundreds of AI-driven science projects in an effort the White House has described as "comparable in urgency and ambition to the…

items.headline: ‘AI communism’, rogue models, and the why Kimi K3 spooked Wall Street
items.summary: Chinese AI lab Moonshot’s open model Kimi went viral this week for reasons that had less to do with the model itself and more to do with how the U.S. AI industry reacted to it. Meanwhile, an unreleased OpenAI model wandered outside its…

items.headline: AI firms want more data centers; Trump's EPA may give neighbors less say
items.summary: Rule would allow states to decide how much—if any—public input there can be.

items.headline: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app
items.summary: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.
